summary: Iteration 32 - New Player Features Testing Complete. All requested features verified working: 1) Bottom navigation with 5 items including protruding search button, 2) SearchPage with IPL team logos in 5-column grid, 3) Dual points banner on homepage, 4) Admin AI Override tab still functional.

minor.issue: Some 422 errors in console during admin navigation - likely validation errors for empty requests, not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: BottomNav.jsx: Clean implementation with 5 tabs, protruding search button uses -mt-7 for protrusion effect
SearchPage.jsx: Well-structured with 10 IPL teams in 5-column grid, search filtering, and Quick Stats section
HomePage.jsx: Dual points banner at lines 192-218 shows Fantasy Points and Contest Coins with gradient backgrounds
PlayerView.jsx: Properly imports SearchPage and handles 'search' tab navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new player features verified: 1) Bottom nav has 5 items - Home, Contest, Search (center protruding red button with glow), Legal, Profile. 2) SearchPage shows all 10 IPL teams (MI, CSK, RCB, KKR, DC, PBKS, SRH, RR, GT, LSG) in 5-column grid with Quick Stats (Live/Upcoming/Completed counts). 3) Clicking team filters matches for that team. 4) Dual points banner shows Fantasy Points and Contest Coins. 5) Admin AI Override tab has Auto-Settle, AI Override, Manual sub-tabs with Review AI buttons.

features_verified.bottom_nav_5_items: Home, Contest, Search (center), Legal, Profile - All present
features_verified.protruding_search_button: Red gradient with glow effect, -mt-7 protrusion - Working
features_verified.search_page_navigation: Clicking search button navigates to SearchPage - Working
features_verified.ipl_team_logos_grid: 10 teams in 5-column grid (MI, CSK, RCB, KKR, DC, PBKS, SRH, RR, GT, LSG) - Working
features_verified.team_filter: Clicking team filters matches for that team - Working (tested with MI)
features_verified.search_input: Search input allows typing to filter teams and matches - Working
features_verified.dual_points_banner: Fantasy Points + Contest Coins banner on homepage - Working
features_verified.admin_ai_override_tab: Auto-Settle, AI Override, Manual sub-tabs - Working
features_verified.admin_content_tab: Questions + Templates tabs with multi-select - Working
